message:
fix: ValidateTemplateVariables now scans Prompts, Inputs, and Output fields

Previously missed template variables in f.Prompts, f.Inputs descriptions,
and f.Output.Directory/LegPattern/Synthesis. Also now checks variables
against both f.Vars and f.Inputs keys.

Fixes gt-yoksx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
